arts.ttl: ‘It’s a difficult question’ - Flick admits to selection headache over De Jong and Casadó
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick is facing quite the selection headache at the moment when it comes to Pedri’s partner in the double pivot of his midfield, with both Marc Casadó and Frenkie de Jong deserving of a chance to start and play big minutes. Hansi has certainly leaned towards the offensive upgrade Frenkie offers in the last month or so, but after conceding quite a few goals in big games recently the coach might also consider inserting Casadó back into the lineup to try and achieve more defensive balance.

arts.ttl: Flick offers update on Szczesny’s future amid contract extension talk
arts.sum: Wojciech Szczesny had to wait quite a while to replace Iñaki Peña as Barcelona’s number one goalkeeper due to Marc-André ter Stegen’s injury, but the Pole has certainly become the undisputed starter with his performances since being inserted into the lineup at the start of the new year. Szczesny has been so good in fact that there’s already talk about him sticking around for another year, and signing a contract extension to become Ter Stegen’s backup when the German returns from injury next season.

arts.ttl: Vitor Roque: Total cost of Barcelona exit revealed
